label: M3: Genetic Programming
formula: sub(log(div(mono_pct, mul(log(div(mono_pct, div(add(plt, mcv), log(add(mono_pct, log(add(mono_pct, log(log(neut_pct))))))))), neut_pct))), neut_pct)

label: M5: Seeded GP
formula: sub(sub(log(div(div(div(mono_pct, sqrt(mchc)), log(div(neut_pct, rbc))), div(neut_pct, rbc))), log(div(neut_pct, rbc))), neut_pct)
